message:
chore(artifacts): refresh verification evidence across sections 10.4–15

Update verification_evidence.json and verification_summary.md files from
concurrent agent re-runs covering sections 10.4, 10.5, 10.6, 10.9, 10.12,
10.14, 10.15, 10.16, 13, and 15. Reflects latest test pass/fail status
and updated timing data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
